class="react-directory-commit-message"><a data-pjax="true" title="feat: Merge butterflow into codemod (#1535)¡

* Initial commit

* test: Add unit tests

* ci: basic CI for tests, formatting, and linting (#1)

* feat: workflow schema generation (#2)

* refactor: remove unused, duplicate struct definitions (#3)

* refactor: remove redundant Task constructor (#4)

* feat: support global outputs (#5)

* refactor: change `commands` -> `run`, and only accept a single string

* feat: support step-level outputs

This will be read by the containing task to produce task outputs.

* feat: task-level outputs

* refactor: move to one global state

* fix: fetch updated state after each step (#6)

This must be done now that we update the state using the diffing method,
rather than just keeping a mutable reference to it.

* feat: support workflow & template parameters

* refactor: unify step action handling by introducing StepAction enum

- Replaced separate `run` and `uses` fields in the Step struct with a single `action` field of type StepAction.
- Updated workflow validation and execution logic to accommodate the new StepAction enum.
- Adjusted tests to reflect changes in step definitions and ensure compatibility with the new action structure.

* chore: Update the workflow JSON schema to use the `oneOf` type for `uses` and `run`

* ci: check for uncommitted schema changes (#9)

* refactor: remove redundant trigger field (#11)

* Revert "refactor: remove redundant trigger field (#11)" (#12)

This reverts commit 95b03c36e75d2fda978160c177f139abc0fdfa60.

* refactor!: change `uses` from vector -> scalar (#14)

Steps should only have one unit of work to keep things simple

* fix: don't attempt to run master tasks (#15)

**Problem:** When running a matrix task, child tasks are executed and
run as normal, but the master task also attempts to run and will produce
variable resolution errors (since it is not really meant to be run, just
to track its children).

**Solution:** Introduce a new `is_master` field to track whether a task
is a master task, and read it to determine whether or not the task
should be run

* refactor: remove unnecessary id, description fields of `step` (#13)

ID is only really needed to select step-level outputs (which we no
longer have). Description isn't a big deal, but names shouldn't be
complex enough that they warrant a separate, longer description than the
one `name` provides.

* feat: Generate TypeScript types with ts-rs

* chore: Mark files in schemas/ as generated

* refactor: Separate state-adapters

* feat: Matrix task recompilation

* refactor: Separate scheduler from core

* feat: Scheduler WASM

* chore: Make the scheduler npm package public

* refactor: Change the matrix values from  string to serde_json::Value

* fix: Improve generated TypeScript types

* feat: Cloud state adapter

* refactor: Separate runners' files

* feat: Ability to run workflows by directory

* fix: Fix tests and cargo fmt

* feat: Add release workflow

* chore: Fix CLI output path

* chore: Initialize CHANGELOG

* chore: unignore cargo.lock

* chore(bump): Bump version 0.1.0

* chore: Support linux ARM builds

* fix: Fix ARM builds libssl error

* chore: Another attempt to fix arm64 builds

* chore(bump): Bump version 0.1.0

* feat: initialize quickjs

* feat(codemod-sandbox): TypeScript compilation

* chore: Upgrade ast-grep to 0.38.2

* fix: Fix the heap allocation issue and node.js env

* fix: Fix lint errors and build features

* feat: Convert quickjs value to wasm JsValue instead of JSON stringification

* feat: Support native env with filesystem module resolution

* refactor: Refactor CLI separating command logics and group workflow commands

* chore: Fix CI

* fix(codemod-sandbox): Use ignore's WalkParallel

* feat: codemod sandbox performing transform and write to target file

* feat: transpile typescript using SWC

* feat(cli): Add jssg (js ast-grep) command to butterflow cli

* fix: Fix releasing butterflow CLI

* chore(release): pull submodules in release workflow

* refactor: separate js source from rust

* chore: temporarily disable windows builds due to quickjs error

* feat: report stats of codemod run

* chore: Remove dist

* fix: Fix the WASM build

* fix: Fix WASI lint errors

* chore: Fix cargo fmt

* chore: release codesign without --timestamp

* chore: Rename butterflow-cli to codemode

* chore: update package versions to 0.1.1 and adjust workspace dependencies

* chore: another attempt at fixing mac build notarization

* chore: rename butterflow-cli to codemod in github actions release workflow

* chore: install coreutils in release pipeline

* chore: disable codemod build for arm64

* chore: fix changelog generation on github actions

* chore(bump): Bump version 0.2.0

* chore: Update workflow.json

* fix: Fix tests failing in CI

---------

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Codemod</h1><a id="user-content-codemod" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Codemod" href="#codemod"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://codemod.com/community" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/1c8ad2fa6d0c017bf7131cebcb7d9f01ebf61fa0d090c91d4c6dc6c90b05762d/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f736c61636b2d6a6f696e2d653961383230" alt="Community" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/badge/slack-join-e9a820" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
<a href="/codemod/codemod/blob/main/LICENSE"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/34e7cb379012c1b124bfa05c81db14041bd681725c16a68a1b69f6313dd976bb/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6769746875622f6c6963656e73652f636f64656d6f642f636f64656d6f64" alt="License" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/github/license/codemod/codemod" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<p dir="auto">Codemod is the AI-powered, community-led platform for automating code migrations, framework upgrades, and large-scale changes.</p>
<p dir="auto">This repo houses the <strong>Codemod CLI</strong> and its underlying <strong>workflow engine</strong> – everything you need to scaffold, test, and run codemods locally or in CI. The CLI can also connect to Codemod’s hosted Registry and Platform when you want to publish or orchestrate migrations across many repositories.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Key Features</h2><a id="user-content-key-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Key Features" href="#key-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/cli" rel="nofollow"><strong>Codemod CLI</strong></a> – Run, test, and publish codemods from your terminal or CI.</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/workflows/quickstart" rel="nofollow"><strong>Workflows</strong></a> – Orchestrate multi-step migrations with YAML configuration, matrix strategies, and manual approval gates.</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/jssg/intro" rel="nofollow"><strong>JSSG</strong></a> – JavaScript ast-grep: write powerful AST transformations in TypeScript with pattern matching and semantic analysis.</li>
<li><a href="https://go.codemod.com/registry" rel="nofollow"><strong>Codemod Registry</strong></a> – Share or discover community codemods via <code>npx codemod publish</code> or <code>npx codemod search</code>.</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/model-context-protocol" rel="nofollow"><strong>Codemod MCP</strong></a> – AI tools for code analysis, AST manipulation, and codemod creation in AI-powered IDEs.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Getting Started</h2><a id="user-content-getting-started" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Getting Started" href="#getting-started"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1) Open the interactive launcher</span>
npx codemod

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2) Scaffold a new codemod project</span>
npx codemod init my-codemod

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3) Test it locally</span>
npx codemod workflow run -w my-codemod/workflow.yaml

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 4) Publish it when you're ready</span>
npx codemod publish my-codemod

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 5) Run it from the Registry</span>
npx codemod @codemod/my-codemod</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# 1) Open the interactive launcher
npx codemod

# 2) Scaffold a new codemod project
npx codemod init my-codemod

# 3) Test it locally
npx codemod workflow run -w my-codemod/workflow.yaml

# 4) Publish it when you're ready
npx codemod publish my-codemod

# 5) Run it from the Registry
npx codemod @codemod/my-codemod" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">In an interactive terminal, bare <code>npx codemod</code> opens a launcher for creating a package or running one from the registry. In non-interactive contexts, it prints next steps and exits with status <code>1</code>.</p>
<p dir="auto">See the full <a href="https://docs.codemod.com/cli" rel="nofollow">CLI reference</a> for every command and option.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Codemod Platform</h2><a id="user-content-codemod-platform" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Codemod Platform" href="#codemod-platform"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The CLI is the engine that powers campaigns inside <a href="https://app.codemod.com" rel="nofollow">Codemod Platform</a>.
Need to coordinate changes across multiple repositories, track progress, or collaborate with your team? The Platform adds insights, orchestration, dashboards, and authoring tools that help teams successfully land large-scale code migrations.</p>
<p dir="auto">Explore our <a href="https://docs.codemod.com" rel="nofollow">documentation</a> to learn more, and join the conversation or share your feedback in our <a href="https://go.codemod.com/community" rel="nofollow">Slack community</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing" href="#contributing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">There are two ways to contribute to the Codemod ecosystem:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contribute to Codemod OSS</h3><a id="user-content-contribute-to-codemod-oss" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contribute to Codemod OSS" href="#contribute-to-codemod-oss"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Help improve the CLI, workflow engine, and JSSG runtime. See the <a href="/codemod/codemod/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md">contributing guide</a> to get started with development setup, testing, and pull requests.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Build and share codemods</h3><a id="user-content-build-and-share-codemods" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Build and share codemods" href="#build-and-share-codemods"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Create codemods for framework upgrades, security patches, or common refactoring patterns. Published codemods help the entire community migrate faster.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/workflows/quickstart" rel="nofollow"><strong>Workflows quickstart</strong></a> – Scaffold your first codemod package</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/jssg/intro" rel="nofollow"><strong>JSSG guide</strong></a> – Write AST transformations in JS/TS</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.codemod.com/publishing" rel="nofollow"><strong>Publishing</strong></a> – Share your contributions to Codemod Registry</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Looking for ideas? Spark a discussion in our <a href="https://go.codemod.com/community" rel="nofollow">Slack community</a> or browse <a href="https://go.codemod.com/registry" rel="nofollow">Codemod Registry</a> for codemods that could use improvements.</p>
